creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This has to be one of the most beautiful restaurants in London, it feels like you’re dining in a palace ✨ From the moment you enter, the staff take care of every detail, the music from the self-playing piano sets the tone and a beautiful scent fills the air. Grab a drink from their newly refurbished bar area and THEN the food arrives 🔥 The flavours are bold and there’s some delicious authentic Indian dishes as well as some with a unique twist, and to end with, the desserts are outstanding 👏 

📍 This is @madhusofmayfair @madhusofficial Madhu’s of Mayfair, winner of Asian Restaurant of the Year London 2025 💥

Located inside The Dilly Hotel @thedillylondon, 21 Piccadilly, W1J 0BH

Share this with someone who would love to go and save this for your next special meal out in London ❤️

transcription.text: This is one of the most beautiful restaurants in London, where it feels like you're dining in an Indian palace. The attention to detail is second to none. A self-playing piano sets the vibe and there's a stunning bar area where you can grab a drink before you head inside for your meal. This is Madhu's of Mayfair, winner of Asian Restaurant of the Year London 2025. The menu has some stunning signature dishes, including the crispy palak patta chaat, as well as dishes from their Robata Grill, like the malai broccoli and asparagus, which was so delicious. They also have some twists along the way, like a burrata curry, and their desserts are absolutely beautiful, so do not skip them. Make sure you save this for a special meal in London and share it with someone who would love to go.
